profile.authenticatedSubtitle: Your account is connected. Auth-only features will sync with the cloud.
profile.anonymousSubtitle: You can keep using the app without an account and sign in later if you want sync and community actions.
profile.signInCardSubtitle: Sign in when you want to submit times, check in, enable notifications, and sync your preferences across devices.

settings.notifications.localLeadTimeHelp: Used for local notifications on this device.
settings.notifications.authenticatedLead: Saved to your account for future queued reminders.
